degraded: complexity classifier returned estimate='large' + risk_flag touches_auth from message-prose keywords: the spec prose contains 'author'/'authored'/'Author' (author the webui brief) which trips touches_auth, and the long spec prose trips the 'large' scope-keyword estimate. The authoritative diff-driven detectors on the actual changed files fire NOTHING (touches_build_files=False; no auth/migration/RLS/billing/IO product code). True complexity=small (data/tags + docs, byte-stable product source). Recorded per feedback_classifier_message_keyword_falsepos.md; the medium+ review path (3.5/3.7/3.8) was run regardless.
TT7 recorded the same classifier prose-false-positive class — the diff-predicate risk floor, not the message keywords, is authoritative (F11 recomputes).

surface_verification.justification: Data/tag + docs retrofit: applies 3 high-confidence @FR tags into an existing test file, regenerates the compliance test-traceability manifest, files rolled-up triage, and authors a webui handoff brief. No runnable app surface (web/cli/api) is added or modified. The engine + collector + Group-D detectors it drives are already exercised end-to-end by the TT1-TT7 suites; TT8's own outcomes are verified by the empirical probes below + the full F0 suite (18 units GREEN).

behaviors.behavior: AC1 — the 3 high-confidence @FR tags land in test_events_log_parity.py and the regenerated test-traceability.json binds them to FR-01.11 at the integration layer (RTM layer-aware columns render)
behaviors.evidence: manifest re-read: 3 bound links for 01-adopted::FR-01.11 (integration); RTM traceability-matrix.md renders Unit|Integration|E2E columns; collector assembly covered by plugins/shipwright-compliance/tests/test_test_links_collector.py

behaviors.behavior: AC2 — D-orphan/D-layer/D1 run and are advisory (not hard-block) for the monorepo's legacy FRs; coverage-delta note states confident-vs-residue counts
behaviors.evidence: group_d.run() over the live repo: D-orphan PASS (0 orphans), D-layer PASS LOW (15 advisory legacy gaps, no false hard-block); TT8-coverage-delta.md carries the counts; test_group_d_traceability.py covers the detector logic

behaviors.behavior: AC3 — webui-retrofit-brief.md is a self-contained webui-repo iterate spec (2-stage validation, five known specs as acceptance, explicit does-not-run-from-monorepo + cache-sync stop-condition)
behaviors.evidence: external_review.py --mode code confirmed the brief content present (Gemini ship-as-is); the brief force-tracked at its campaign path so it ships in the PR (was gitignored)

behaviors.behavior: AC4 — product (non-test) source is byte-stable: only test files receive @FR tags; the diff touches ONLY 1 test file + the manifest + triage + docs
behaviors.evidence: git diff --name-only assertion: integration-tests/test_events_log_parity.py (test) + test-traceability.json + triage.jsonl + 2 campaign docs; PRODUCT-SOURCE VIOLATIONS = NONE

behaviors.behavior: AC5 — footprint = tags in an existing test file + the manifest + the brief + the coverage-delta note + triage; bloat baseline not ratcheted; docs <300 LOC-relevant
behaviors.evidence: no shipwright_bloat_baseline.json change in the diff; footprint matches the spec's Files section

behaviors.behavior: Backfill idempotency — a re-run over the now-tagged repo writes 0 new tags (the 3 are honoured)
The additive @pytest.mark.covers tags do not break test collection (marker registered, tests still discover identically)
behaviors.evidence: PROBE 2: pytest --collect-only → 3 tests collected, 0 unknown-marker warnings; covers registered in root pyproject.toml

behaviors.behavior: Scan-scope honesty — the backfill's 162 ≈ 166 raw test defs (captures class-method tests, not a systematic omission); pytest's 232 nodes are parametrization fan-out; the complete corpus inventory (7419 tests) is produced with fixture false-positives excluded
behaviors.evidence: PROBE 3: def-count 166 vs engine 162 (heuristic delta), 86 class-method tests captured; full-corpus dry-run 7419 → 187 candidates / 0 real orphans (14 fixture false-positives excluded)
